reviews.review_description: Straightforward app. Effective for teaching the alphabet, but the quiz mode has a few issues - it struggles with seeing my finger/thumb positions on certain letters (e.g. P, K, etc.), plus sounds and colors during 'sign' quiz mode aren't intuitive so you don't know when to try again or if you lost bc of time. Maybe more standard timer and success/fail sounds could help along with better handtracking. Would also be great to include common word signs, not just alphabet.
The game is perfect, it will greatly help me with my ASL finger spellings.
